hero_subtitle: SFTY transforms fragmented provider data into clear, structured compliance case summaries to improve audit readiness and accelerate VASP operational workflows.

problem_title: Case summaries depend on manual compilation
problem_description: Compliance operations struggle to produce structured, consistent case summaries when data remains scattered across multiple providers and systems. This creates delays, gaps in audit evidence, and inconsistent case documentation that complicate regulatory review and internal decision-making.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider data, case details, reviewer notes, and decision logs into an automated workflow that produces consistent, audit-ready compliance case summaries for efficient operations teams.
workflow_title: From case creation to summary report
workflow_description: SFTY organizes case details, reviewer notes and decisions to generate structured compliance summaries for audit-ready reporting and operational review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs a connected compliance layer that connects provider checks into structured workflows, decisions, evidence and reports for digital asset case management and regulatory review.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate case summary generation?
faq_2_answer: SFTY automates case summaries by aggregating provider outputs, regulatory triggers and reviewer notes into clear, structured compliance case reports with AI-assisted drafting where enabled.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready case evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence through detailed decision logs, linked provider data, case histories and regulatory rule mappings to support traceability and review readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow layer without replacing them, supporting seamless data orchestration and compliance controls.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace onboarding or KYT providers but integrates their outputs into a provider-neutral platform to enable centralized review and consistent workflow automation.
final_title: Turn provider outputs into structured case summaries
final_description: Review how SFTY generates clear, audit-ready compliance summaries that connect provider data into operational VASP workflows.
